title: Savings Calculator
description: Calculate how much your savings will grow over time with interest. See the impact of regular contributions and compound interest on your savings balance.
metaDescription: Free savings calculator — find out how your savings will grow over time. Calculate future value with compound interest, regular deposits, and different APY rates.

title: CD Calculator
description: Calculate the interest earned on a certificate of deposit. Compare CD terms and rates to find the best return on your investment.
metaDescription: Free CD calculator — calculate interest earned on certificates of deposit. Compare APY rates and terms to maximize your CD returns.

title: Mortgage Payment Calculator
description: Calculate your monthly mortgage payment including principal, interest, taxes, and insurance. See a full amortization schedule for any loan amount.
metaDescription: Free mortgage payment calculator — calculate monthly payments, total interest paid, and see a full amortization schedule for any home loan.

title: Loan Payment Calculator
description: Calculate monthly payments for any type of loan including personal loans, auto loans, and student loans. See total interest cost and payoff timeline.
metaDescription: Free loan payment calculator — calculate monthly payments, total interest, and payoff timeline for personal loans, auto loans, and more.

title: Compound Interest Calculator
description: See how compound interest grows your money over time. Calculate future value with different compounding frequencies and contribution amounts.
metaDescription: Free compound interest calculator — see how your money grows with daily, monthly, or annual compounding. Calculate future value and total interest earned.

title: Debt Payoff Calculator
description: Find out how quickly you can pay off your debt and how much interest you will save by making extra payments. Compare avalanche vs. snowball payoff methods.
metaDescription: Free debt payoff calculator — calculate how to pay off debt faster and save on interest. Compare extra payment strategies and debt payoff timelines.

title: Monthly Budget Calculator
description: Create a monthly budget and see where your money goes. Track income vs. expenses and identify opportunities to save more each month.
metaDescription: Free budget calculator — build a monthly budget, track expenses, and find ways to save more. Simple income vs. expense breakdown with savings rate.

title: Retirement Savings Calculator
description: Project how much you will have at retirement based on your current savings, contributions, and expected investment returns. See if you are on track.
metaDescription: Free retirement savings calculator — project your retirement balance, determine if you are on track, and see how contributions and returns affect your nest egg.

title: Credit Card Payoff Calculator
description: Calculate how long it will take to pay off your credit card balance and how much interest you will pay. See the impact of paying more than the minimum.
metaDescription: Free credit card payoff calculator — find out how long it takes to pay off credit card debt and how much interest you will save by paying more than the minimum.

title: Emergency Fund Calculator
description: Find out how much you should have in your emergency fund and how long it will take to save it. Based on your monthly expenses and risk tolerance.
metaDescription: Free emergency fund calculator — find out how much to save for emergencies and how long it will take. Personalized recommendations based on your monthly expenses.
